## 🎨 Add New Color Theme: "Saffron Dusk"

**Category:** Community Contribution - Theme  
**Difficulty:** Easy (good first issue!)  
**Estimated Time:** <1 min

---

### 🎯 Your Task

Add this beautiful new theme to KanaDojo!

### Theme Details

| Property | Value |
|----------|-------|
| **ID** | `saffron-dusk` |
| **Background** | `oklch(21.0% 0.040 55.0 / 1)` |
| **Main Color** | `oklch(78.0% 0.160 60.0 / 1)` |
| **Secondary** | `oklch(70.0% 0.095 40.0 / 1)` |

> 💡 **Vibe:** Late sunlight over temple roofs

### 📝 Instructions

1. Star our repo ⭐
2. Fork our repo 🍴
3. Open [`community/content/community-themes.json`](../blob/main/community/content/community-themes.json) in your browser (click the link!)
4. Scroll to the bottom of the file and paste the following theme object just before the closing `]`:

```typescript
{
  id: 'saffron-dusk',
  backgroundColor: 'oklch(21.0% 0.040 55.0 / 1)',
  mainColor: 'oklch(78.0% 0.160 60.0 / 1)',
  secondaryColor: 'oklch(70.0% 0.095 40.0 / 1)'
},
```

5. Make sure the JSON stays valid (add a comma after the previous last entry if needed)
6. Save the file and commit the changes
7. Submit a Pull Request with title: `feat(theme): add Saffron Dusk theme`
8. Link this issue using `Closes #<issue_number>`
9. Wait for review!

## Add Japanese Cultural Etiquette Tip

**Category:** Community Contribution - Cultural Etiquette  
**Difficulty:** Easy (good first issue!)  
**Estimated Time:** <1 min

---

### Your Task

Add this etiquette tip to help learners navigate Japanese social situations confidently!

### The Etiquette Tip

**Situation:** 公共スペース 4

- Do: ゴミを持ち帰る
- Avoid: ゴミを放置する

> **Note:** ゴミ箱が少ない地域がある。

### 📝 Instructions

1. Star our repo ⭐
2. Fork our repo 🍴
3. Open [`community/content/japanese-cultural-etiquette.json`](../blob/main/community/content/japanese-cultural-etiquette.json) in your browser (click the link!)
4. Scroll to the bottom of the file and paste the following cultural etiquette object just before the closing `]`:

```json
{
  "situation": "公共スペース 4",
  "do": "ゴミを持ち帰る",
  "dont": "ゴミを放置する",
  "note": "ゴミ箱が少ない地域がある。"
}
```

5. Add a comma after the previous last entry in the array (so the JSON stays valid)
6. Save the file and commit the changes
7. Submit a Pull Request with title: `content: add new cultural etiquette tip`
8. Link this issue using `Closes #<issue_number>`
9. Wait for review!

Summary

During new member registration, the **Skills** step of onboarding immediately displays a *"Please select at least one skill."* validation error on page load — before the user has interacted with or submitted the form.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Start the registration flow as a new user.
2. Progress through onboarding steps until reaching the **Skills** step.
3. Observe the form state on arrival — do **not** click or submit anything.

## Expected Behavior

No validation errors are shown until the user attempts to submit or explicitly interact with the field.

## Actual Behavior

*"Please select at least one skill."* is displayed immediately when the Skills step renders, before any user action.

## Affected Area

Registration / Onboarding — Skills step

## Environment

| Field   | Value |
|---------|-------|
| Browser | <!-- e.g. Chrome 124 --> |
| OS      | <!-- e.g. Windows 11 --> |
| Role    | Guest (new registrant) |

## Screenshots / Screen Recording

<!-- A screenshot of the pre-interaction error state would help. -->

## Additional Context

This is a premature validation trigger. The error should only surface on submit (or on blur if inline validation is intended). ## Add Japanese Cultural Etiquette Tip

**Category:** Community Contribution - Cultural Etiquette  
**Difficulty:** Easy (good first issue!)  
**Estimated Time:** <1 min

---

### Your Task

Add this etiquette tip to help learners navigate Japanese social situations confidently!

### The Etiquette Tip

**Situation:** 訪問時の玄関 4

- Do: 玄関で靴を脱ぎ、向きをそろえる
- Avoid: 土足で室内に上がる

> **Note:** 家庭・旅館では基本マナー。

### 📝 Instructions

1. Star our repo ⭐
2. Fork our repo 🍴
3. Open [`community/content/japanese-cultural-etiquette.json`](../blob/main/community/content/japanese-cultural-etiquette.json) in your browser (click the link!)
4. Scroll to the bottom of the file and paste the following cultural etiquette object just before the closing `]`:

```json
{
  "situation": "訪問時の玄関 4",
  "do": "玄関で靴を脱ぎ、向きをそろえる",
  "dont": "土足で室内に上がる",
  "note": "家庭・旅館では基本マナー。"
}
```

5. Add a comma after the previous last entry in the array (so the JSON stays valid)
6. Save the file and commit the changes
7. Submit a Pull Request with title: `content: add new cultural etiquette tip`
8. Link this issue using `Closes #<issue_number>`
9. Wait for review!

## 🎌 Add Japanese Proverb (ことわざ)

**Category:** Community Contribution - Proverb  
**Difficulty:** Easy (good first issue!)  
**Estimated Time:** <1 min

### 🎯 Your Task

Add this traditional Japanese proverb to help learners understand Japanese wisdom!

### The Proverb

| Japanese | Reading | English |
|----------|---------|---------|
| **虎穴に入らずんば虎子を得ず** | Koketsu ni irazunba koji wo ezu | You can’t get the tiger’s cub without entering the lair |

> 💡 **Meaning:** No reward without risk

### 📝 Instructions

1. Star our repo ⭐
2. Fork our repo 🍴
3. Open [`community/content/japanese-proverbs.json`](../blob/main/community/content/japanese-proverbs.json) in your browser (click the link!)

```json
{
  "japanese": "虎穴に入らずんば虎子を得ず",
  "romaji": "Koketsu ni irazunba koji wo ezu",
  "english": "You can’t get the tiger’s cub without entering the lair",
  "meaning": "No reward without risk"
}
```

5. Add a comma after the previous last entry in the array (so the JSON stays valid)
6. Save the file and commit the changes
7. Submit a Pull Request with title: `content: add new japanese proverb`
8. Link this issue using `Closes #<issue_number>`
9. Wait for review!

### The Trivia Question

**Question:** Which Japanese castle is nicknamed the "White Heron" for its bright exterior? (Community variation 9)

```json
    "Nijo Castle"

  "correctIndex": 0
}
```

```json
  "note": "丁寧さは姿勢で伝わる。"
}
```

Description

The hamburger menu on mobile devices opens correctly when the menu button is clicked. However, clicking the hamburger button again does not close the menu as expected.

Currently, the menu only closes when the user clicks outside the menu area.
## Bug Demonstration

The following screen recording demonstrates the issue:

https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/1874ac4d-0467-4934-a871-ad99dcf83e36

## Current Behavior

- Hamburger menu opens successfully
- Clicking outside the menu closes it
- Clicking the hamburger icon again does NOT close the menu

## Expected Behavior

The hamburger menu should behave as a proper toggle:

- First click → Open menu
- Second click → Close menu

## Possible Cause

The mobile menu state may not be toggling correctly when the hamburger button is clicked repeatedly.

Potential areas to inspect:
- Menu state management
- Click event handling
- Toggle function logic
- Conditional rendering

## Tech Stack

- React / Next.js
- Tailwind CSS

## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] Hamburger menu closes on second click
- [ ] Toggle behavior works consistently
- [ ] No UI flickering
- [ ] No console errors
- [ ] Existing outside click close behavior remains functional

## 🎬 Add Famous Anime Quote

**Category:** Community Contribution - Anime Quote  
**Difficulty:** Easy (good first issue!)  
**Estimated Time:** <1 min

---

### 🎯 Your Task

Add this iconic anime quote so learners can enjoy Japanese pop culture!

### The Quote

| Japanese | Romaji | English |
|----------|--------|---------|
| **逃げちゃダメだ!** | Nigeccha dame da! | I mustn't run away! |

**Anime:** Neon Genesis Evangelion  
**Character:** Shinji Ikari

### 📝 Instructions

1. Star our repo ⭐
2. Fork our repo 🍴
3. Open [`community/content/anime-quotes.json`](../blob/main/community/content/anime-quotes.json) in your browser (click the link!)
4. Scroll to the bottom of the file and paste the following anime quote object just before the closing `]`:

```json
{
  "japanese": "逃げちゃダメだ!",
  "romaji": "Nigeccha dame da!",
  "english": "I mustn't run away!",
  "anime": "Neon Genesis Evangelion",
  "character": "Shinji Ikari"
}
```

5. Add a comma after the previous last entry in the array (so the JSON stays valid)
6. Save the file and commit the changes
7. Submit a Pull Request with title: `content: add anime quote`
8. Link this issue using `Closes #<issue_number>`
9. Wait for review!
